description: LIVE/DEMO enforcement at COMPONENT level (not just page level)

live-demo-detector.evidence: DataSourceBadge component created at src/components/ui/DataSourceBadge.tsx. Provides isLive-driven LIVE/DEMO badge at component level. DataSourceBanner for page-level DEMO surfaces. Both exported from ui/index.ts barrel. Existing ModuleStates.tsx (LiveBadge/DemoBadge) in intelligence modules remains for backward compatibility. New DataSourceBadge uses design token classes (signal-up, signal-warn) instead of hardcoded hex. 66/99 hooks already return isLive flag. All DEMO arrays properly prefixed with DEMO_ or MOCK_. No unlabeled fake data found.

build-gate.evidence: npx tsc --noEmit = 0 errors. npm run build = success.

enforcement_architecture.demo_array_convention: All mock arrays prefixed DEMO_ or MOCK_
